market_brief.summary_en: CONSTRUCTIVE regime at 62.6/100 persists with VIX at 21.51 as SPY and QQQ both reach 5 distribution days amid fearful sentiment.
market_brief.summary_ko: 건설적 레짐 62.6 유지 속 SPY QQQ 분배일 주의
key_themes_en: SPY and QQQ distribution days at 5 (WARNING)
market_brief.watch_points_en: Monitor QQQ at $705.06 and SPY at $737.55 for distribution day resolution

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $415.17 with price below EMA21 at $416.14 and EMA50 at $395.58. Stage2 5/7 and RS 70.7 with UPTREND structure provide solid base despite fearful sentiment. Broad semiconductor selloff with TSM down 6.7% amid AI trade de-risking and macro concerns.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM 전일종가 $415.17 EMA21 $416.14 아래 위치. Stage2 5/7 RS 70.7 UPTREND 구조 유지. 광범위 반도체 매도세 속 AI 무역 디리스킹 우려로 6.7% 하락.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price below EMA21 $416.14 and 52-week high $450.29 at -7.8%
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: EMA50 $395.58 support and GC above structure
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA50 $395.58 지지 및 GC 위 구조

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $205.10 below EMA21 at $214.54 yet above EMA200 at $186.42. Stage2 5/7 with CONFIRMED_UPTREND and optimistic sentiment at 0.7. Massive hyperscaler GPU rental deals and RTX 50 series promotion highlight sustained AI demand.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA 전일종가 $205.10 EMA21 $214.54 아래 EMA200 $186.42 위. Stage2 5/7 CONFIRMED_UPTREND 구조. 대형 하이퍼스케일러 GPU 임대 계약과 RTX 50 시리즈 프로모션으로 AI 수요 지속.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price 13.2% below 52-week high $236.29 and below EMA21

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $593.00 below EMA21 at $616.43 and EMA200 at $642.90. Stage2 1/7 with DOWNTREND monthly and fearful sentiment at -1.8. Dilution fears from FT report on potential tens-of-billions equity raise for AI capex.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META 전일종가 $593.00 EMA21 $616.43 EMA200 $642.90 아래. Stage2 1/7 월봉 DOWNTREND. FT 보도에 따른 수십억 달러 규모 주식 발행 검토 우려로 fearful 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $391.00 below EMA21 at $417.04 and EMA50 at $408.06. Stage2 5/7 with DISTRIBUTION structure and optimistic sentiment at 0.5. Core Tesla community stays bullish on robotaxi, Optimus and energy despite weakness tied to SpaceX capital rotation.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA 전일종가 $391.00 EMA21 $417.04 EMA50 $408.06 아래. Stage2 5/7 DISTRIBUTION 구조. 로보택시 옵티머스 에너지에 대한 테슬라 커뮤니티 낙관 유지.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price 21.6% below 52-week high $498.72 and DISTRIBUTION structure
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Volume contraction near EMA200 $396.39 for energy accumulation
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: 거래량 수축 EMA200 $396.39 근처 에너지 축적

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $135.53 below EMA21 at $141.63 and EMA200 at $147.49. Stage2 0/7 with DISTRIBUTION and DOWNTREND monthly. UK firearms licensing contract for guns/explosives/poisons data triggers privacy and surveillance backlash.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: PLTR 전일종가 $135.53 EMA21 $141.63 EMA200 $147.49 아래. Stage2 0/7 DISTRIBUTION 월봉 DOWNTREND. 영국 총기 허가 계약 관련 프라이버시 감시 논란.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $864.01 above all EMAs including EMA21 at $845.31 and EMA200 at $418.43. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 with CONFIRMED_UPTREND and fearful sentiment at -0.9. Sharp sell-off in MU and semis triggered by Broadcom's softer AI outlook and rate-hike fears from strong jobs data.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MU 전일종가 $864.01 모든 이평선 위 EMA21 $845.31 EMA200 $418.43 상회. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 CONFIRMED_UPTREND. 브로드컴 AI 전망 완화와 고용지표 금리 인상 우려로 반도체 급락.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price 20.7% below 52-week high $1,089.55 and fearful sentiment
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: All EMAs support with volume contraction for accumulation
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: 모든 이평선 지지 거래량 수축으로 축적 기회

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $671.02 above EMA21 at $646.39 and EMA200 at $479.66. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 with CONFIRMED_UPTREND and optimistic sentiment at 0.4. Strong Q1 earnings beat with 26% revenue growth and 250% AI ARR ramp tempered by post-earnings stock dip and valuation concerns.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: ⚠RSI decline divergence and price 14.6% below 52-week high $785.74
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: GC above and all EMAs support

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $246.03 below EMA21 at $260.48 yet above EMA200 at $233.35. Stage2 4/7 with DISTRIBUTION and optimistic sentiment at 0.5. Buy-the-dip sentiment on potential debt offering viewed as AI funding with strong long-term AWS/AI conviction.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price below EMA21 and 11.7% below 52-week high $278.63

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $416.67 below EMA21 at $423.85 and EMA200 at $435.23. Stage2 2/7 with UPTREND monthly but DOWNTREND and optimistic sentiment at 0.7. Microsoft AI Skills Fest event and in-house AI model MAI-Thinking-1 drawing positive attention.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MSFT 전일종가 $416.67 EMA21 $423.85 EMA200 $435.23 아래. Stage2 2/7 월봉 UPTREND이나 DOWNTREND. AI Skills Fest와 자체 AI 모델 MAI-Thinking-1 주목.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $307.34 above EMA21 at $301.99 and EMA200 at $263.87. Stage2 6/7 RS 68.7 with DISTRIBUTION and optimistic sentiment at 0.4. Traders note relative strength vs tech selloff and excitement building for WWDC 2026 AI updates.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AAPL 전일종가 $307.34 EMA21 $301.99 EMA200 $263.87 상회. Stage2 6/7 RS 68.7 DISTRIBUTION. 기술주 매도 속 상대 강도 주목 WWDC 2026 AI 업데이트 기대.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: DISTRIBUTION structure and only 3.0% below 52-week high $316.85
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: All EMAs support with GC above

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $368.53 below EMA21 at $376.34 yet above EMA200 at $305.72. Stage2 5/7 with CONFIRMED_UPTREND and optimistic sentiment at 1.3. Discussion centers on Alphabet's large equity raise for AI capex alongside strong Google Cloud growth and a major SpaceX compute deal.
